## Summary

Describe the change you are making.

## Why this change?

Explain why this change is needed.

## Tests

- [ ] I added or updated tests for all code changes in this PR.
- [ ] For bug fixes, I added regression coverage.
- [ ] I ran `go test -race -count=1 ./...`.
- [ ] I ran `go vet ./...`.

## Beta Traceability (required for PRs targeting `feature/path_to_beta`)

- [ ] I listed the finding/task IDs addressed by this PR.
- [ ] I updated source tracking docs and struck through completed/replaced items.
- [ ] I added PR links next to updated tracking items.
- [ ] If plan/scope changed, I added a "Plan Change Rationale" section below with explicit why.
- [ ] I updated the `BETA_BLOCKERS_PROGRESS.md` plan change log for any scope change.

## Plan Change Rationale (required if scope changed)

Describe exactly what changed from plan, why it changed, and what alternatives were considered.

## Risk / Rollback Notes (optional)

Describe user impact, known risks, and how to roll back if needed.
